sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_date Date);
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = subtractQuarters(event_date, 1) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_date, subtractQuarters(event_date, 2) AS adjusted_date FROM test_dates;
WITH toDate('2024-01-01') AS start_date SELECT subtractQuarters(start_date, 3) AS three_quarters_back;
